gold.basis: Central-bank accumulation and ETF inflows dominate; supportive but rate-sensitive.

silver.basis: Rides gold's monetary bid plus industrial (solar) demand; more volatile than gold.

platinum.basis: Producer discipline supportive; demand caught between diesel decline and hydrogen growth.

palladium.basis: Structurally pressured by EV substitution away from gasoline autocatalysts.

rhodium.basis: Thin market, extreme volatility; tied almost entirely to autocatalyst demand.

lithium.basis: Price corrected hard; production discipline and permitting cuts now tightening the surplus.

cobalt.basis: Oversupplied near-term; DRC concentration and offtake activity are the swing factors.

nickel.basis: Indonesian supply surge weighs on price; trade-policy responses are the key variable.

copper.basis: Energy-transition demand vs. constrained new supply; broad, liquid, bellwether market.

graphite.basis: Chinese export licensing is the dominant swing factor; demand growth is structural.

neodymium.basis: Magnet demand structural; Chinese policy and Western stockpiling pull in opposite directions.

dysprosium.basis: Heavy-REE supply even tighter than light REEs; highly exposed to export-control policy.

gallium.basis: A near-pure China policy instrument; price carries a large permission-risk premium.

germanium.basis: Same structure as gallium; byproduct supply plus export-licensing leverage.

tin.basis: A quiet direct bet on electronics demand; supply is geographically scattered.
